evals.prompt: Create a new release v2.3.0 for our NestJS app. We use conventional commits and GitHub releases. Generate the changelog from commits since v2.2.0, bump the version, create a git tag, and publish a GitHub release with release notes.
evals.expected_output: Changelog generated, version bumped, git tag created, GitHub release published with grouped entries

assertions.name: changelog_generated
assertions.description: CHANGELOG.md updated with entries grouped by Added/Changed/Fixed/Security

assertions.name: semver_bump
assertions.description: Version bumped to 2.3.0 following semver

assertions.name: git_tag
assertions.description: Git tag v2.3.0 created

assertions.name: github_release
assertions.description: gh release create used to publish release notes

assertions.name: ci_check
assertions.description: CI status verified before creating release

evals.prompt: We need to do a hotfix release. A critical bug was found in v2.3.0. The fix is already merged to main. Create v2.3.1 with just the bug fix in the changelog.
evals.expected_output: Patch version bump, minimal changelog with just the fix, tag, and release

assertions.name: patch_bump
assertions.description: Version is 2.3.1 (patch), not 2.4.0 (minor)

assertions.name: minimal_changelog
assertions.description: Changelog only includes the bug fix, not other pending changes

assertions.name: git_tag
assertions.description: Tag v2.3.1 created

assertions.name: ci_verified
assertions.description: CI status checked before release

assertions.name: urgency_noted
assertions.description: Release notes indicate this is a hotfix/critical bug fix

evals.prompt: Plan a major version release (v3.0.0). We're introducing breaking changes: removed 3 deprecated API endpoints, renamed the User model to Account, and changed the auth flow from session to JWT. What should the release process look like?
evals.expected_output: Major release plan with migration guide, breaking changes documentation, deprecation notice, and phased rollout

assertions.name: major_bump
assertions.description: Version is 3.0.0 (major for breaking changes)

assertions.name: breaking_changes_doc
assertions.description: Breaking changes listed with migration instructions

assertions.name: migration_guide
assertions.description: Step-by-step guide for upgrading from v2 to v3

assertions.name: deprecation_notice
assertions.description: Previous deprecation notices referenced

assertions.name: rollback_plan
assertions.description: Rollback procedure to v2.x if issues arise

evals.prompt: Set up automated release workflow using GitHub Actions. On push to main, it should: run tests, generate changelog, bump version based on conventional commits (feat=minor, fix=patch, BREAKING CHANGE=major), create tag, and publish GitHub release.
evals.expected_output: GitHub Actions workflow with semantic-release or equivalent for automated versioning and release

assertions.name: github_actions_workflow
assertions.description: Complete workflow YAML triggered on push to main

assertions.name: conventional_commit_parsing
assertions.description: Parses commits to determine version bump type

assertions.name: auto_changelog
assertions.description: Changelog generated automatically from commit messages

assertions.name: auto_tag
assertions.description: Git tag created automatically

assertions.name: auto_release
assertions.description: GitHub release published automatically with notes

evals.prompt: We have a monorepo with 3 packages (api, web, shared). Each package should be versioned independently. When shared changes, both api and web should get a new release. Set up the release process.
evals.expected_output: Independent versioning per package with dependency-aware release ordering

assertions.name: independent_versions
assertions.description: Each package has its own version number

assertions.name: dependency_ordering
assertions.description: shared released before api and web when shared changes

assertions.name: per_package_changelog
assertions.description: Each package gets its own changelog entries

assertions.name: workspace_aware
assertions.description: Release process understands npm workspace structure

assertions.name: cascade_releases
assertions.description: Changes to shared trigger releases of dependent packages
